description: We are looking for an experienced backend developer to join our growing engineering team. The ideal candidate will design and implement scalable microservices, work with cloud-native technologies, and mentor junior developers.
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field. At least 5 years of professional software development experience. Strong understanding of software design patterns and clean architecture principles. Experience with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
preferred_qualifications: Master's degree preferred. Experience with distributed systems. Open-source contributions.
required_skills: .NET Core, C#, Python, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, REST API design, Git
responsibilities: Design and develop backend microservices using .NET Core and Python. Implement RESTful APIs following clean architecture principles. Optimize database queries and manage PostgreSQL schemas. Set up CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments. Conduct code reviews and mentor junior team members. Collaborate with frontend and AI teams on integration.

description: Join our AI team to build cutting-edge NLP and machine learning solutions for our HR-tech platform. You'll work on CV analysis pipelines, candidate matching algorithms, and conversational AI systems.
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field. 3+ years of experience in ML/NLP. Strong Python programming skills. Experience with transformer-based models and LLM applications.
preferred_qualifications: PhD in NLP or related. Publications in top-tier conferences. Experience with LangChain or similar frameworks.
required_skills: Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Hugging Face Transformers, LangChain, FastAPI, Docker, NLP, RAG, Vector Databases, SQL
responsibilities: Develop and maintain NLP pipelines for CV parsing and analysis. Build RAG-based systems for candidate-job matching. Fine-tune and deploy transformer models. Design evaluation metrics and A/B testing frameworks. Integrate AI services with backend microservices via REST APIs.

description: We need a creative and detail-oriented frontend developer to build beautiful, responsive user interfaces for our recruitment platform. You will work closely with UX designers and backend engineers.
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience. 2+ years of React.js development. Solid understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript ES6+. Experience with responsive design and cross-browser compatibility.
preferred_qualifications: Experience with Three.js or WebGL. Knowledge of accessibility standards (WCAG). Experience with design systems.
required_skills: React.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Redux, REST API integration, Git, Figma
responsibilities: Develop and maintain React.js components for the recruitment platform. Implement responsive layouts following design specifications. Integrate frontend with backend REST APIs. Optimize application performance and bundle sizes. Write unit and integration tests using Jest and React Testing Library.
